calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jul-26-2023 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Aug-01-2023 Granted Per Written Order

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Jul-26-2023 Continued To Aug-01-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Order To Produce Decedent'S Google Account Contents
Off Calendar Apr-19-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Stephen Grant appeared by zoom for Daniel Debeer (administrator).

The court stated that it is concerned about the decedent's privacy, that it would prefer to proceed with allowing disclosure of a catalogue of electronic communications, but without disclosure of the content, and questions why the administrator feels he needs this information. Mr. Grant presented oral argument to support his petition. Upon conclusion of argument the court is convinced and granted the Petition for Order to Produce Decedent's Account Contents (order signed in open court).

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Probate Examiner: Aeyoung Kim. Deputy: Choi. Not reported.

Petition For Order To Produce Decedent'S Google Account Contents
Off Calendar Apr-04-2023 Continued To Apr-19-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Aug-30-2022 Granted Per Written Order
